div.head: The Ambassador in the United Kingdom (Kennedy) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 1344. From Rublee. The British have now accepted the principle of a full meeting of the Intergovernmental Committee. They propose Monday December 12 and Tuesday December 13 as the dates for the meeting but hope that the dates may be kept confidential in view of the fact that Berenger and AndreaeW. C. Beucker Andreae, head of the legal section of the Netherland Ministry for Foreign Affairs. and the Latin American Vice Chairmen still must accept the plan. [Rublee.]
